race.comment: Off last start, BRILLIANT HORIZON (2) is clearly the one to beat. She resumed on the Lakeside circuit and destroyed them from the front on heavy ground, winning by 2.25 lengths. Up in grade here but it doesn't look a whole lot tougher and she'll give a huge sight again. DAVIDA (1) is the interesting one first up. She was very well backed to beat Observer and Planet Red in a G2 before a break but couldn't handle the pressure up on speed. A couple of wins prior rated well, it's just how forward she is here. RACE FOR RULE (8) broke through for a dominant maiden win when last seen at Pakenham over 1400m and should be strong late. AMPING LASS (6) was behind BRILLIANT HORIZON last time but is racing well and has claims. AFTERBERNA (9) is a handy filly who sets up well and is in the mix.
